_meta.authority: Republic Act No. 9679 (HDMF Law of 2009), as amended
notes: Effective February 2024: maximum Monthly Fund Salary (MFS) raised from ₱5,000 to ₱10,000.
Employee/employer rates depend on MFS bracket.
Mandatory contribution is capped; members may opt to contribute more voluntarily (out of scope for this package).

brackets._upper_comment: null = no upper, but MFS is capped at msc.cap (₱10,000)
